title: Tutor Intelligence builds Data Factory to train robot AI in the real world
title_zh: Tutor Intelligence builds Data Factory to train robot AI in the real world
abstract:
Tutor Intelligence is running 100 Sonny semi-humanoid robots in its headquarters while sharing technology and data with its Cassie mobile manipulator. 
 The post  Tutor Intelligence builds Data Factory to train robot AI in the real world  appeared first on  The Robot Report .
abstract_zh: Tutor Intelligence is running 100 Sonny semi-humanoid robots in its headquarters while sharing technology and data with its Cassie mobile manipulator. The post Tutor Intelligence builds Data Factory to train robot AI in the real world appeared first on The Robot Report .
tldr_zh: Tutor Intelligence is running 100 Sonny semi-humanoid robots
cover_zh: Tutor Intelligence is running 100 Sonny semi-humanoid robots
